summary: The page is a strong, near-pixel-perfect reproduction of the design with all 11 sections present, in correct order, EDS signature classes applied, and accurate text/asset references. Remaining issues are minor sizing/weight deviations (hero arrow size, card title font-size, ISI bold-line color/weight) consistent with the 93.3% pixel-match.

issues.actual: Rendered at ~41x41px (rotate transform inflates visual size)
issues.fix: Constrain icon to 29x29px and verify rotation does not scale it

issues.actual: List item lead-in renders at different size/weight/color (computed 18px/400/rgb(33,37,41) for some ISI text)
issues.fix: Force ISI body text to 15px, weight 700, #000000 to match spec
Ensure .ep-l-h weight 700 wins over Bootstrap defaults

issues.expected: Design uses muted blue-gray bar (#50758A approximation)
issues.actual: Matches closely but relies on !important overrides; acceptable
issues.fix: No change needed; verify token usage where available

issues.expected: Go button and ZIP field match design sizing precisely
issues.actual: Close but Go button width/contrast slightly differs
